entry.value: [["currentConversationId","pins","agentExecutionMode","isPanelCollapsed","displayedAnnouncements","conversations","onboarding","a|0|1|2|3|4|5|6","2eeded47-5608-480f-adec-5a84f8286268","o|","auto","b|T","a|","733e1165-1985-4aef-8584-4a9a10395c72","16f63922-916d-41af-8037-2bbd62a7de56","a|D|E|8","id","createdAtIso","lastInteractedAtIso","feedbackStates","selectedModelId","requestIds","isPinned","isShareable","extraData","personaType","toolUseStates","chatHistory","draftExchange","a|G|H|I|J|K|L|M|N|O|P|Q|R|S","2025-11-15T22:31:54.890Z","claude-sonnet-4-5","b|F","isAgentConversation","hasDirtyEdits","a|X|Y","o|Z|B|W","n|0","request_message","rich_text_json_repr","mentioned_items","status","a|c|d|e|f","","type","content","a|i|j","doc","a|i","paragraph","o|m|n","a|o","o|k|l|p","draft","o|g|h|q|C|r","o|T|D|U|U|9|V|C|W|W|a|b|9|C|s","name","rootTaskUuid","a|G|u|H|I|J|K|L|M|N|O|P|v|Q|R|S","Sustainability AI Model Project Setup\n","2025-11-15T22:31:54.956Z","2026-04-04T00:08:40.271Z","claude-sonnet-4-6","hasTitleGenerated","a|X|Y|11","o|12|B|W|B","769fcff1-c417-46e0-896e-9d7a7cebfa9c","a|c|d|f","o|15|h|q|r","o|w|E|x|y|z|9|10|C|W|B|13|b|14|9|C|16","a|G|u|H|I|K|L|M|N|O|v|J|Q|R|S","Sustainability AI Model Development Session","2026-04-04T00:12:00.863Z","2026-04-23T18:06:38.516Z","claude-opus-4-6","baselineTimestamp","a|X|Y|11|1D","o|1E|B|W|B|b","30857bd5-a698-40b3-8e2c-589efb44a2c1","o|18|8|19|1A|1B|1C|C|W|W|1F|1G|9|9|C|16","o|F|t|17|1H","shown","workspaceQuestions","a|1J|1K","o|1L|W|C","o|7|8|9|A|B|C|1I|1M"],"1N"]

{"diagramDefinition":" flowchart TB subgraph TRAINED["✅ YOUR TRAINED MODELS — You Own These Weights"] V["️ Vision Model
ResNet50d — 25M params
94.62% accuracy
20 epochs, YOUR training data
Checkpoint: best_model_epoch19"] G["️ GNN Knowledge Graph
GATv2 — 4-head attention
200 epochs, link prediction
Checkpoint: best_gnn_gatv2.pth"] end subgraph NOT_TRAINED["❌ NOT TRAINED — Renting an API"] L[" LLM (Language Model)
Currently: raw OpenAI API call
No fine-tuning done
No adapter weights exist
No LoRA trained"] end subgraph READY[" READY TO TRAIN — Code + Config Exists"] SFT["training/llm/train_sft.py
LoRA SFT pipeline (complete code)"] CFG["configs/llm_sft.yaml
Llama-3-8B-Instruct base
LoRA r=64, alpha=128"] DATA["data/processed/llm_sft/
12 expert examples + old QA data"] end SFT -.->|"needs to run"| L CFG -.->|"configures"| SFT DATA -.->|"trains on"| SFT style TRAINED fill:#dcfce7,stroke:#22c55e,color:#111 style NOT_TRAINED fill:#fef2f2,stroke:#ef4444,color:#111 style READY fill:#fef9c3,stroke:#eab308,color:#111 ","title":"Current State: What's ACTUALLY Trained vs. What's Not"}
